headline: Analyst Downgrades Eversource Energy (ES) to Hold. Here is Why
summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is included among the 13 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026. Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is an energy provider serving customers in Connecticut, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire. On June 12, Argus analyst Marie Ferguson downgraded Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) from Buy to Hold, without assigning the stock a price target. The downgrade […]
